params.description: Four real-world images displayed: a hand showing 5 fingers, tally marks grouped by 5s, nickels worth 5 cents each, and a clock face with marks every 5 minutes.

beats.text: You've been grouping by 5s all lesson. But 5s show up everywhere in real life! Which of these uses groups of 5?
Which of these uses groups of 5? Select all that apply.

validator.description: Student selected all four options, correct

beats.text: All of them! Hands have 5 fingers. Tallies group by 5s. Nickels are worth 5 cents. Clocks mark every 5 minutes. Grouping by 5s is everywhere—and now you use it for graphs too.

elements.description: Four real-world images: hand, tally marks, nickels, clock face. All four selected and confirmed.
